titleStmt.title: SII 19.16: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 16. (A.R. No. 558 of 1920.) ON THE SAME WALL.

summary.p: This records a gift of 12(1/2) kaḻañju of gold for a lamp in the temple, left in charge of the mahā-sabhā of the village, by Echchil Śadurākaraṉ alias Teṉṉavaṉ Miṟaināṭṭu-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ of Dēvaṉguḍi in Miṟaikkūṟṟam. The details of the date given viz., Tulā, Sunday, Jyēshṭhā, which would correspond to A.D. 969, October 17, makes the inscription assignable to Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesarivarmmarkku yāṇṭu 2 Āvatu vaṭakarai
śrī viranārāyaṇaccaturvvetimaṅkalattu tiruvaṉan=tiśvarattu paramasvā
mikku vaṭakarai miṟaikūṟṟattu tevaṉkuṭi tevaṅkuṭaiyāṉ Eccilc ca
turākaranāṉa teṉṉavaṉ miṟaināṭṭu muven=taveḷār candrādittavaṟ
Eriya vaiytta tirunontāviḷakku 1- kku vaiytta poṉ 10 2�5 paṉṉiru
kaḻaiñcarai Ippoṉṉukku Ivvāṭṭai tulānāyaṟṟu nāyaṟṟukkiḻa
mai peṟṟa tirukkeṭṭai mutal Oru nontāviḷakku Erippatāka vaiytta Itu
mahāsabhai yārrakṣai . Ivaṉe kū ttaperumāḷukku cāttina maThe last line is damaged.
Digital edition of SII 19.16 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
